description_long: This is a rectangular loaf-style cake with a white icing layer covering the top and sides, adorned with numerous small red fruit pieces, likely strawberries or raspberries, scattered across the surface and around the base. The cake is presented on a large, white, slightly curved serving tray, with a single slice cut and placed adjacent to the main loaf. The interior of the cake appears to be a dense, brown sponge, suggesting a chocolate or spice flavor. The icing is smooth and glossy, with a few green leaves as garnish on top, adding a touch of freshness. The overall presentation is festive and inviting, suitable for celebrations or gatherings in an urban park or street food setting.
description: A rectangular loaf cake with white glossy icing, red fruit decorations, and a single slice cut, displayed on a white tray.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cut face of the cake slice, the main loaf with white icing, and red fruit decorations on top and around the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the cake, the smooth white icing, and the arrangement of red fruit pieces along the top and tray.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uncut end of the cake, the dense brown interior, and the decorative fruit and leaves on top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full loaf, the separated slice, and the spread of fruit decorations on the tray.
